name: hw3-validation-intelligence-pipeline
description: HW3: Validate and classify contact form submissions with AI-powered Intent/Urgency analysis. Invalid leads are flagged (not discarded) and all records are persisted to Google Sheets.

config.note: All payloads are accepted regardless of validity — validation is handled inside the pipeline

config.behaviour: Never returns an error — sets validation_status=Valid|Invalid and logs validation_errors

output_schema.intent: Sales | Support | Partnership | Inquiry | Complaint | Other

config.note: If message is empty (invalid lead), returns default Other/Low without calling API

steps.name: Persist Full Record to Google Sheets CRM

config.destination: Google Sheets — HW3_Leads tab OR hw3_leads.csv (fallback)
config.note: ALL records are written regardless of validation_status — no lead is ever discarded

architecture: Input ({name, email, message}) → Validation (Email/Format Check) → AI Analysis (Intent/Urgency) → CRM/Sheets (Full Record + Metadata)

hw3_requirements.validation_logic: Missing fields + email format check; both conditions logged in validation_errors
hw3_requirements.lead_flagging: validation_status column: 'Valid' | 'Invalid'; invalid leads are saved, not discarded
hw3_requirements.ai_classification: Gemini 2.0 Flash Lite classifies intent (6 categories) and urgency (3 levels)
hw3_requirements.data_persistence: Every submission (valid or invalid) is written to Google Sheets HW3_Leads tab with full metadata
